# Whistle AI — Comprehensive Reference

> AI-powered export intelligence platform for Korean manufacturers and global B2B buyers.
> Website: https://whistle-ai.com
> Company: MOTIVE Innovation Inc. (South Korea) / MOTIVE Global, Inc. (Delaware, USA)

## Platform Overview

Whistle AI is a B2B SaaS platform that uses artificial intelligence to streamline international trade for Korean manufacturers. The platform serves two distinct user groups:

1. **Korean Manufacturers/Exporters** — who want to sell their products internationally but lack export expertise, market knowledge, or buyer connections.
2. **Global B2B Buyers** — who want to source trending Korean products (K-Beauty, K-Food, K-Health) directly from verified manufacturers.

The platform eliminates the traditional barriers to international trade by automating HS code classification, FTA benefit calculations, market analysis, document generation, and buyer-manufacturer matching through AI.

## Detailed Feature Breakdown

### AI Product Analysis Engine
When a manufacturer uploads a product photo, Whistle AI's Claude-powered engine performs:
- Product identification and categorization
- HS (Harmonized System) code classification with 6-10 digit precision
- Target market recommendations based on product category, competition, and demand
- Competitive landscape analysis showing similar products in target markets
- Export price recommendation considering tariffs, shipping, and market positioning
- Regulatory and certification requirements per target country

### HS Code Classification
- Uses Claude AI to analyze product images and descriptions
- Returns primary and alternative HS codes with confidence scores
- Cross-references against Korea Customs Service database
- Supports 97 chapters of the Harmonized System
- Accuracy validated against professional customs broker classifications

### FTA (Free Trade Agreement) Simulator
- Covers 18+ FTA agreements Korea has with partner countries
- Calculates tariff reduction percentages and monetary savings
- Shows rules of origin requirements for FTA eligibility
- Compares MFN (Most Favored Nation) rates vs. FTA preferential rates
- Generates FTA utilization recommendations

### Buyer Matching Algorithm
- AI-powered matching based on product category, target market, order volume, and buyer preferences
- Verified buyer profiles with trade history
- Direct messaging between matched parties
- RFQ (Request for Quote) system

### Export Document Generation
- Commercial Invoice templates
- Packing List templates
- Certificate of Origin guidance
- Bill of Lading preparation
- Customs declaration assistance

### Korean Trend Search (for Buyers)
- Real-time product trend data aggregated from Korean e-commerce platforms
- Categories: K-Beauty, K-Food, K-Health, Hair/Body, Lifestyle
- Age-demographic filtering (trending among 20s, 30s, 40s, 50s+)
- Manufacturer verification status
- Direct sample request functionality

## Pricing Details

### Subscription Plans (Monthly, USD)
| Plan | Price | AI Analyses | Features |
|------|-------|-------------|----------|
| Free Trial | $0 | 3 credits | Basic analysis, limited features |
| Starter | $29/mo | 30/month | Export tools, email support, document templates |
| Professional | $79/mo | Unlimited | FTA simulator, buyer matching, priority support, full market reports |
| Enterprise | $199/mo | Unlimited | Dedicated manager, API access, custom integrations, white-label options |
| Single Analysis | $9.90 | 1 | One-time purchase, no subscription required |

### Buyer Pricing
- All buyer features are 100% free
- No commission on transactions during beta period

## Technical Architecture
- **Frontend**: Vanilla JavaScript SPA with React components
- **Backend**: Supabase (PostgreSQL, Row-Level Security, Edge Functions, Realtime subscriptions)
- **AI**: Anthropic Claude API (claude-sonnet-4-6) for product analysis and classification
- **Payments**: Stripe (global), Toss Payments (Korea domestic)
- **Hosting**: Cloudflare Pages (primary), GitHub Pages (mirror)
- **Auth**: Supabase Auth with email/password and social login

## Industry Context

### Why Korean Exports?
- South Korea is the world's 6th largest exporter
- K-Beauty market: $13.2B globally, growing 9.4% CAGR
- K-Food market: $10.1B in exports, driven by Korean Wave (Hallyu)
- Korean government actively supports SME exports through voucher programs
- 18+ Free Trade Agreements covering 58 countries

### Competitive Landscape
Whistle AI differentiates from:
- **Traditional trade consultancies** — by offering AI-powered instant analysis vs. weeks of manual research
- **Alibaba/Global Sources** — by providing export intelligence and trade compliance, not just listings
- **HS code lookup tools** — by combining classification with full export strategy
- **Government export portals (KOTRA, KITA)** — by offering a modern UX with AI automation

## Government Voucher Programs
Whistle AI is registered as an official service provider for:
- **수출바우처 (Export Voucher)**: Korean government program subsidizing export services for SMEs
- **제조혁신바우처 (Manufacturing Innovation Voucher)**: Government program supporting manufacturing digitization

## Supported Languages
- Korean (primary for manufacturers)
- English (for global buyers and English-speaking manufacturers)
